query:
INSERT INTO stat_lb_sample (
                reservation_id,
                sampled_at,
                drop_bad_udplb_version,
                drop_blocked_src,
                drop_epoch_assign_miss,
                drop_lb_calendar_miss,
                drop_mbr_info_miss,
                drop_no_udplb_hdr,
                drop_not_ip,
                rx_bytes,
                rx_packets,
                rx_v2,
                rx_v3
            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
